title: pelargonium × suffultum
intro: Pelargonium × suffultum, also known as a type of bush geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the production of essential oils, which contain compounds like geraniol and linalool, offering potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial benefits. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to help soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × suffultum can be found in teas, capsules, and essential oils, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
